evals.prompt: Audit this generated SaaS landing page. Remove generic sections and copy, keep the actual product information, and give me an accessible simplification plan.
evals.expected_output: An evidence-labeled end-to-end report that uses the existing-artifact workflow, identifies unsupported claims, selects a dominant structure, applies visual and motion gates, and finishes with verification.
assertions: The output does not claim the page was AI-generated solely from style.
The output separates observed facts from unknowns.
The output includes accessibility and reduced-motion checks.
The output orders removals by priority.

evals.prompt: Use these verified project notes to define a very simple portfolio. Do not invent clients, outcomes, or testimonials.
evals.expected_output: A new-artifact workflow beginning with grounded content, followed by structure and visual budgets, with no invented proof.
assertions: The output begins from supplied project facts.
The output selects one dominant portfolio structure.
Missing outcomes remain missing rather than being fabricated.

evals.prompt: Use the anti-ai-slop orchestrator explicitly, but only rewrite the hero sentence to be more concrete. Do not redesign the page.
evals.expected_output: The orchestrator narrows the workflow to content grounding, specificity editing, and a light verification rather than running a full visual audit.
assertions: The output does not introduce a page redesign.
The rewrite is tied to supplied evidence.

evals.prompt: Give me a fast anti-slop pass on this one-page draft. I don't need a score or a release check yet, just the most important fixes.
evals.expected_output: A single quick-pass review that reports the top prioritized changes with evidence labels and explicitly states that accessibility, reflow, and reduced-motion behavior were not verified.
assertions: The output does not run the full multi-skill pipeline or produce a release verdict.
The output limits itself to a small prioritized set of changes with locations.
The output states which checks were skipped and offers the full workflow as follow-up.
The output still labels evidence and invents no support.

evals.prompt: Run an end-to-end audit of this dashboard. Its rounded cards contain inset surfaces, and I supplied screenshots plus computed radius and padding values.
evals.expected_output: The workflow audits the observable signal, evaluates shared nested contours with the visual budget, and repeats the relationship check during final verification.
assertions: Radius-token count alone is not treated as proof of coherence.
Computed values are distinguished from screenshot observations.
The output does not infer AI authorship from the rounded-card pattern.
